queue_item.action: Adapt GitHub Actions OIDC trust policy to immutable owner and repository ID subject claims introduced July 15, 2026.
required_evidence: explicit trust limit and falsification route

progress.finding: GitHub now documents immutable OIDC subject claims containing owner and repository IDs for newly created repositories, opt-in repositories, and repositories renamed or transferred after July 15, 2026.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-equivalent module and test logic

queue_item.handoff: Vercel and Cloudflare workflows should first observe the live signed OIDC subject format, resolve immutable owner/repository IDs from trusted GitHub metadata, then migrate trust policy from legacy-compatible mode to requireImmutable=true. Subject acceptance remains identity evidence, not proof of deployment or claim truth.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Add this record to ACTIVE_QUEUE.json in a conflict-aware aggregation step; do not overwrite records owned by other teams.
